why_this_role: I want to apply my data engineering and AI skills to real-world problems at scale. I am looking for a role where I can work on challenging data and AI systems and grow while contributing meaningfully from day one.
greatest_strength: I build complete end-to-end systems. I have taken projects from raw data all the way to deployed results — a 167 million row NLP querying system, a RAG evaluation framework, a computer vision proctoring system, and an agentic AI agent.
greatest_weakness: I sometimes spend too long perfecting a solution before shipping. I have learned to set clear scope and iterate rather than over-engineer from the start.
salary_expectation: Open to discussion based on the role and company. My focus is on finding the right opportunity.
years_of_experience: 1 year of professional experience — Data Science Intern at G10X Technology from January 2025 to April 2025, and currently Data Engineer at LTIMindtree from May 2025 to present
willing_to_relocate: Open to Kochi, Bangalore, and Trivandrum. Comfortable with remote and hybrid arrangements.
work_authorization: Indian citizen, eligible to work in India and remotely for international companies
describe_yourself: I am Mariya Mathew. I completed my B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science from Rajagiri School of Engineering and Technology in 2025 and currently work as Data Engineer at LTIMindtree in Bangalore. I have built RAG pipelines, NLP models, LLM-powered systems, and Azure cloud data architectures through my academic projects and internship.
why_leaving: I am looking for a role more focused on AI and machine learning where I can work on more technically challenging problems and deepen my expertise.
